'''''Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal''''' was published by [[West End Games]] [[1997]].
This Volume collects various articles and stories from a number of [[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]s.

==Contents==
*''[[Stranded]]'' by [[Chuck Truett]]
*''[[The Gree Enclave]]'' by [[Timothy S. O'Brien|Timothy O'Brien]]
*''[[The Kaal Connection]]'' by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[Timothy Zahn]]
*"[[Relic (article)|Relic]]" by [[George R. Strayton]]
*[[Counterstrike (Adventure Journal)|''Counterstrike'']] by [[George R. Strayton]]
*''[[Stand at Bhir'khi Pass]]'' by [[Timothy S. O'Brien|Timothy O'Brien]]
*''[[You're in the Army Now!]]'' by [[James L. Cambias|James Cambias]]
*''[[The Pentastar Alignment]]'' by [[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]]
*''[[Enemies for Life]]'' by [[Stephen Luminati]]
*''[[Swoop Gangs]]'' by [[Wayne Humfleet]] and [[John Beyer]]
*''[[The Cure]]'' by James L. Cambias
